node_11.subject: Clarence Reinger
node_11.object: a healthy, viable intrauterine pregnancy with normal findings, requiring only routine UTI
node_11.description: Clarence Reinger Clarence's main takeaway is that they have a confirmed, healthy, viable pregnancy located properly in the uterus, and while their history of recurrent UTIs means the care team will stay vigilant with routine urine cultures, everything looks normal—so they can live life as usual and simply call the same day if any UTI symptoms appear.
node_11.embedding_key: Clarence Reinger Clarence's main takeaway is that they have a confirmed, healthy, viable pregnancy located properly in the uterus, and while their history of recurrent UTIs means the care team will stay vigilant with routine urine cultures, everything looks normal—so they can live life as usual and simply call the same day if any UTI symptoms appear.
keywords: a healthy, viable intrauterine pregnancy with normal findings, requiring only routine UTI
